common.tagline: Run your business with clarity and capability.

seo.title: Tiram — GST billing & inventory software for Indian SMBs
seo.description: Tiram helps Indian shops create GST invoices, track multi-warehouse stock, record payments, and work in Tamil or English on cloud or offline desktop apps for Windows and Mac.
seo.ogTitle: Tiram — GST billing & inventory for Indian shops
seo.ogDescription: GST invoices, multi-warehouse inventory, credit tracking, reports, and Tamil/English workflows for Indian small businesses.
seo.keywords: GST billing software, inventory software India, Tamil billing app, UPI payment billing, small business billing, thermal printer billing, multi-warehouse inventory, Vyapar alternative, Tally alternative
seo.orgDescription: Tiram is billing and inventory software for Indian small businesses. GST-ready, multi-warehouse, UPI payment-ready, bilingual (Tamil + English), and available as cloud plus offline desktop apps for Windows and Mac.

hero.eyebrow: GST billing and inventory for Indian SMBs
hero.h1: GST billing and inventory software for Indian shops
hero.subhead: Tiram helps shop owners and distributors create GST invoices, track stock across shop, godown, and van, record payments, and work in Tamil or English on cloud or offline desktop apps for Windows and Mac. A mobile app is under development.
hero.microTrust: 30-day free trial · No card needed · Cloud + offline desktop for Windows and Mac

trust.intro: Everything an Indian small business needs — out of the box.

outcomes.heading: The daily shop workflows Tiram covers
outcomes.intro: One place for the jobs Indian SMBs repeat every day: billing, stock, dues, and reports.

items.label: Invoices with HSN/SAC, CGST/SGST/IGST, and FY-aware reports

Customer dues, payment allocation, aging, and defaulter tracking
Sales, GST, cash, inventory, profit, and audit reports

howItWorks.heading: Run your shop in 4 steps.
howItWorks.intro: From product setup to invoice, payment, and daily report — the workflow stays connected.

steps.title: Add stock
steps.body: Products with HSN, reorder levels, and warehouse-wise stock counts.

steps.title: Bill in seconds
steps.body: Pick customer, add items, print thermal or share the link.

steps.title: Track dues
steps.body: Record payments, age receivables, spot defaulters before they hurt.

steps.title: Decide daily
steps.body: Dashboard ranks what to act on — GST due, dues, slow stock.

india.heading: Built for India, not adapted to it
india.intro: Every detail — from GST invoicing to UPI payment recording to thermal and browser printing — is built around Indian counter workflows.

items.title: GST invoicing
items.body: Compliant invoice formats, GSTIN validation, and FY-aware reports.

items.title: UPI payment recording
items.body: Save the business UPI ID, mark invoice payments as UPI, and keep payment history tied to each customer.

items.title: Tamil-first UI
items.body: Not a translation layer — full bilingual UI, including receipts and reports.

items.title: Browser and thermal printing
items.body: Print invoices from the browser and set up ESC/POS thermal receipts for counter billing.

items.title: Multi-warehouse for distributors
items.body: Shop, godown, van — track stock where it sits and transfer in one tap.

items.title: Offline desktop for Windows and Mac
items.body: Use Tiram on a shop desktop when internet is unreliable. The offline desktop app is available for Windows and Mac, with activation support from the Tiram team.

testimonials.heading: Built around real Indian shop workflows
testimonials.intro: Tiram is shaped for counters, godowns, credit customers, and CA-ready GST reporting.

faq.heading: Questions, answered
faq.intro: Short answers. If you want a longer one, write to us.

items.a: Yes. Tiram has a 30-day free trial with no credit card required. The Standard plan is priced per user, with monthly and annual billing options.
Yes. Tiram supports GSTIN, HSN/SAC on line items, automatic CGST/SGST/IGST calculation based on place of supply, and GST summary reports your CA can use.
Yes. The app works in Tamil and English, and the thermal receipt path includes Tamil-friendly raster rendering where the printer setup supports it.
Yes. Tiram stores the business UPI ID and lets staff record invoice and receipt payments by UPI, cash, card, bank transfer, credit, or other modes.

items.q: Can I print to a thermal printer?
items.a: Yes. Tiram supports browser printing for invoices and ESC/POS thermal printer setup for counter receipts, including Tamil-friendly raster printing where supported.
Yes. Every business is fully isolated — no shared rows. Authentication is industry-standard, data is encrypted in transit, and only people you invite can see your books.

items.q: Can multiple staff members use it?
items.a: Yes. Invite staff to your business with role-based access — counter, accountant, or admin — and an audit trail tracks who did what.

items.q: Can I switch from Tally or Vyapar?
items.a: Yes. You can bulk-import products and customers from a spreadsheet exported from any other tool. Reach out if you need help with the migration.

items.q: Does Tiram have an offline desktop app?
items.a: Yes. Tiram has an offline desktop app available for Windows and Mac, useful for shop counters where internet access is unreliable. Contact the Tiram team for desktop activation.

items.q: Is there a Tiram mobile app?
items.a: The Tiram mobile app is under development. Today, businesses can use the cloud web app or the offline desktop app for Windows and Mac.

finalCta.heading: Less ledger. More leverage.
finalCta.subhead: Stop juggling spreadsheets and start running the business.
